checks.name: security invariants
checks.detail: no unsafe blocks or unwrap/expect in production; security defaults documented

checks.name: MCP schemas
checks.detail: valid JSON schemas for 5 tools; version negotiation present

checks.name: self indexing and context
checks.detail: indexed self: 47 files, 301 symbols, 378 call edges; context bytes reduced 98.6%

checks.name: incremental and redaction
checks.detail: unchanged hashes preserved; one-file modification isolated; 4/4 secrets redacted

checks.name: Git diff mapping
checks.detail: Git unified diff mapped changed auth.rs line range

limitations: This Python harness does not compile or execute the Rust binary.
Rust compilation, rustfmt, Clippy, unit, integration, and MCP process tests must run under Cargo/CI.
Reference context-reduction metrics measure byte volume on this repository, not model accuracy or end-to-end development speed.
